leadText: Origin Pulse (Japanese: こんげんのはどう Origin Pulse) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced during Generation VI, in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is the signature move of Kyogre.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.2 Other effects Effect [ edit | edit source ] Origin Pulse deals damage to all adjacent opponents. Its power is boosted by 50% when used by a Pokémon with the Ability Mega Launcher . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 1.2.1 of Pokémon Sword and Shield , Origin Pulse could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 1.3.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in previous generations. Other effects [ edit | edit source ] Origin Pulse does not exist in the game data of Pokémon X and Y . As a result, a Pokémon knowing Origin Pulse cannot be traded from Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire to Pokémon X and Y, and if a Pokémon in Pokémon Bank knows the move it cannot be withdrawn in Pokémon X and Y. In order to be transferred to Pokémon X and Y, the Pokémon must forget Origin Pulse.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user attacks opposing Pokémon with countless beams of light that glow a deep and brilliant blue. ZA The user attacks targets with countless beams of light that glow a bluish white.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD It damages enemies. * It damages nearby enemies. *

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Origin Pulse is the only aura and pulse move that cannot be learned by a Pokémon with Mega Launcher . Origin Pulse is also the only aura or pulse move that cannot target non-adjacent Pokémon in Triple Battles to exist in a game featuring Triple Battles.
